title: Ministry of Justice (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ministry of Justice''' could refer to:

*'''[[Ministry of Justice (New Republic)|Ministry of Justice]]''' of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Department of Justice]]'''
*'''[[Ministry of Justice (Balawai)|Ministry of Justice]]''' of the [[Balawai]] [[Representative Council]]
*'''[[Ministry of Justice (Cartann)|Ministry of Justice]]''' of the [[Cartann]]
*'''[[Ministry of Justice building|Ministry of Justice Building]]''' on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the New Republic
*'''[[Ministry of Justice Building]]''' on [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]
*[[Minister of Justice]]
*[[Galactic Alliance Department of Justice]]

{{Disambig}}
